data.name: University Rush
data.detailed_description:
Play as a young man forced to leave the love of his life and attend college in another state to pursue the dream of joining a fraternity. Parties, romance, and drama will fill your life.

Make your dreams of the best university life come true. Build relationships and become part of a fraternity. It all depends on your choices.
data.about_the_game:
Play as a young man forced to leave the love of his life and attend college in another state to pursue the dream of joining a fraternity. Parties, romance, and drama will fill your life.

Make your dreams of the best university life come true. Build relationships and become part of a fraternity. It all depends on your choices.
data.short_description: University Rush is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel focusing on the best parts of college life. Dive into your journey in Alabama as a freshman. Build your relationships and strive to become a part of Greek life. The game is packed with humor, sex, and drama.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP hr higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
